content: Guide: How to download capital gains statement. Steps: Open Groww App/Web Go to Profile (You) -> Reports Select 'Tax Filing' or 'Reports' section Find 'Capital Gain' or 'Capital Gain (Mutual Funds)' Select Financial Year and Download PDF Password: PAN in CAPITAL letters

metadata.title: How to download capital gains statement
